name: Default VPC network exists in project
description: The default VPC network still exists in the project. The default network comes with pre-configured permissive firewall rules (allow-internal, allow-ssh, allow-rdp, allow-icmp from 0.0.0.0/0) that are often left in place. Resources created without an explicit network are placed in the default VPC, inheriting these open rules.
remediation: Delete the default network: gcloud compute networks delete default. Create custom-mode VPC networks with explicit subnets and firewall rules sized to actual requirements. Ensure all new projects have an Organization Policy to skip default network creation (constraints/compute.skipDefaultNetworkCreation).
